headline: AI security and large-scale security analytics researcher at AWS
title: Sr. Principal Scientist
confidenceNote: Personal site, Amazon Science, NYU, LinkedIn, and Google Scholar consistently identify him as an AWS senior principal scientist in New York focused on AI, machine learning, and information security.
bioMarkdown: Senior Principal Scientist at Amazon Web Services in New York City working at the intersection of AI, machine learning, and large-scale information security. He founded AWS's Security Analytics and AI Research team, has prior research experience at Yahoo Research and AT&T Security Research, and is also listed as an NYU Tandon adjunct professor.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: Identifies Coskun as a Senior Principal Scientist at AWS in New York City focused on AI/ML for large-scale information security applications.

primary.label: Amazon Science author profile
primary.note: Amazon profile and publications connect him to security, privacy, abuse prevention, anomaly detection, and AWS research.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists him as Senior Principal Scientist at AWS and notes work on AI for security, security for AI, and founding AWS Security Analytics and AI Research.

primary.label: NYU Tandon faculty page
primary.note: Lists him as an adjunct professor in electrical/computer engineering and computer science with research interests in machine learning, data science, and information security.

secondary.label: Google Scholar profile
secondary.note: Verified scholarly profile for Amazon Web Services with interests including machine learning, data mining, information security, and network security.

secondary.label: Amazon Research Awards announcement
secondary.note: Quotes Coskun as a senior principal scientist with GuardDuty discussing AI and cybersecurity research.

headline: Engineering Director at Broadcom with semiconductor and memory-circuit patent background
title: Engineering Director
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and people-directory sources align on Broadcom director role and Irvine location; patents provide technical signal, but public biographical detail is sparse.
bioMarkdown: Engineering Director at Broadcom Inc. based in Irvine. Public patent records list him as an inventor on Broadcom memory-cell and high-voltage switch circuitry patents, suggesting a semiconductor hardware background useful for conversations around chip engineering, embedded systems, and technical leadership.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Radieddine as Director of Engineering at Broadcom Inc. in Irvine.

primary.label: Broadcom company profile
primary.note: Official Broadcom site confirms the company's semiconductor and infrastructure software context, though not Radieddine's individual profile.

secondary.label: Justia patents inventor page
secondary.note: Lists patent applications and grants naming Bassem Radieddine, including Broadcom-related one-time programmable memory cell work.

secondary.label: Google Patents - memory cell with fuse element
secondary.note: Names Bassem Radieddine as an inventor on a Broadcom-originated memory-cell patent.

secondary.label: Wiza profile
secondary.note: People-directory listing says he is Director of Engineering at Broadcom and based in Irvine; contact details were ignored.

headline: Cofounder and President of Zo Computer, building an AI-powered personal cloud computer
title: Cofounder
confidenceNote: Zo's official team page, LinkedIn, X, GitHub, and speaker pages consistently identify him as Zo Computer cofounder/president with prior Stripe and Venmo experience.
bioMarkdown: Cofounder and President of Zo Computer, where he is building an AI-powered personal cloud computer for agents, automations, and personal software. Previously he was on the early Venmo team and spent more than eight years at Stripe, including work as an early engineer on Terminal and mobile/developer-platform strategy.

primary.label: Zo Computer team page
primary.note: Official team page lists Ben Guo as President and Cofounder in Brooklyn, with early Venmo and Stripe background.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists him as Zo Computer cofounder and notes Stripe experience from 2015 to 2023, including early work on Terminal.

primary.label: X profile
primary.note: Profile identifies him as cofounder and president at Zo Computer, with prior Stripe, Venmo, and Harvard affiliations.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Profile and pinned repositories show Zo Computer-related work and Stripe iOS history.

secondary.label: AI Engineer World's Fair schedule
secondary.note: Lists Benjamin Guo as Cofounder at Zo Computer.

secondary.label: MLOps Community speaker page
secondary.note: Speaker bio describes his Venmo, Stripe Terminal, and Zo Computer background.

secondary.label: Supra Insider interview
secondary.note: Interview summary frames Zo as a personal cloud computer with built-in AI agents, file storage, scheduled tasks, and text/email commands.

headline: CTO at Nawiri Group, supporting technology for purpose-led African travel brands
title: CTO
location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and org-directory sources identify him as Nawiri Group CTO in Cape Town; official company sources establish Nawiri's business context, but his own public bio is limited.
bioMarkdown: Chief Technology Officer at Nawiri Group, a purpose-led African travel group behind safari and responsible-travel brands including Asilia and Go2Africa. His background appears centered on software and technology leadership for travel, hospitality, and impact-oriented operations, with public sources placing him in Cape Town.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Ben Hart as Chief Technology Officer at Nawiri Group in Cape Town.

primary.label: Nawiri Group official site
primary.note: Official company site describes Nawiri Group as a purpose-led travel group based in Africa, operating safari brands and impact initiatives.

primary.label: Nawiri Group about page
primary.note: Explains Nawiri's mission around sustainable travel, ecosystems, and local communities.

secondary.label: The Org - Nawiri Group org chart
secondary.note: Org chart lists Ben Hart as Chief Technology Officer at Nawiri Group.

secondary.label: Prospeo profile
secondary.note: People-directory profile lists him as Nawiri Group CTO in Cape Town and notes prior software-development leadership roles; contact details were ignored.

secondary.label: B Lab profile for Nawiri Group
secondary.note: B Corp listing describes Nawiri Group's responsible travel subsidiaries and operating footprint.

headline: CTO and Cofounder of Raindrop, building observability for AI agents
title: CTO + Co-Founder
confidenceNote: Personal site, Raindrop blog, YC profile, LinkedIn, and X consistently identify him as Raindrop cofounder/CTO with prior Apple Human Interface and SpaceX avionics experience.
bioMarkdown: CTO and Cofounder of Raindrop, which monitors production AI agents and helps teams detect, track, and fix hidden failures. Previously worked on Apple's Human Interface team, including visionOS, and has earlier avionics experience at SpaceX. Useful match for conversations on AI product reliability, observability, evals, and agent failure modes.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: Identifies Hylak as cofounder of Raindrop and describes its focus on discovering, tracking, and fixing AI-agent issues.

primary.label: Raindrop blog author page/article
primary.note: Official Raindrop article lists him as CTO and Co-Founder and discusses evals and production AI monitoring.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Co-Founder and CTO role at Raindrop, plus prior Apple and software experience.

primary.label: X profile
primary.note: Profile identifies him as CTO at Raindrop, with prior Apple design and SpaceX engineering experience.

secondary.label: Y Combinator company profile
secondary.note: Lists Raindrop as a YC W24 company in San Francisco and names Ben Hylak as a founder building AI-agent monitoring.

secondary.label: Pulse 2.0 seed funding article
secondary.note: Reports Raindrop's funding and names Ben Hylak among the founders, with Apple Human Interface Design background.

secondary.label: Substack about page
secondary.note: Lists him as CTO at Raindrop.ai, ex-Apple design, and SpaceX avionics.
